steps.title: Use the coordinate meanings
steps.content: The problem defines $x$ as length and $y$ as width. A point $(x,y)$ on the graph gives one possible length-width pair.

steps.title: Interpret the point
steps.content: For $(4,9)$, the $x$-coordinate is $4$ and the $y$-coordinate is $9$. So the length is $4$ meters and the width is $9$ meters. The answer is C.
